category_sources: Official GitHub README says LunarML is a Standard ML compiler that produces Lua/JavaScript.
source_facts.description: Standard ML compiler that produces Lua/JavaScript.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses LunarML.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to LunarML Read the Docs as the documentation; Read the Docs lists Introduction, Usage, Language, Library, Lua interface, and JavaScript interface sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already set to https://github.com/minoki/LunarML; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it compiles Standard ML to Lua/JavaScript and documents CLI examples using lunarml compile.
